tasks.title: Audit all production unwrap() occurrences

tasks.title: Convert high-risk unwrap() to error propagation
tasks.description: Convert high-risk unwrap() locations in routes/*.rs to proper error propagation
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify route handlers return proper errors instead of panicking
AddErrorHandlingTest: test route error paths with invalid inputs
tasks.impl_notes: Focus on route handlers that can fail on edge cases

tasks.title: Verify zero unwrap() in production
tasks.description: Run grep command to verify zero unwrap() occurrences in production code
test_criteria: RunTestSuite: grep command returns zero matches for unwrap() in production
test_commands: grep -r '\.unwrap()' crates/*/src/ --include='*.rs' | grep -v 'test' | grep -v 'Test' || echo 'No unwrap() found'
tasks.impl_notes: Final verification step after fixing all unwrap() occurrences. Regression test `conventions::unwrap_audit::tests::no_unwrap_in_production_code` passes, confirming zero unwrap() in production code outside #[cfg(test)] blocks. Also fixed compile error in execute/mod.rs.
